'''fatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:juristically|juristically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juristically|juristically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fatate|fatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fatatesher|fatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatatesherĂ«m|fatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fatatero|fatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fatateshĂ«|fatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatateshĂ«m|fatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifatatero|gokifatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifatateshĂ«|gokifatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifatateshĂ«m|gokifatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofatankerom|gofatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofatankeshĂ«|gofatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofatankeshĂ«m|gofatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofatankeya|gofatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fataterom|fataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatatemu|fatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fatateya|fatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifataterom|gokifataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifatatemu|gokifatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifatateya|gokifatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fatatate|fatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fatatatesher|fatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatatatesherĂ«m|fatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fatatatero|fatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fatatateshĂ«|fatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatatateshĂ«m|fatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifatatatero|gokifatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifatatateshĂ«|gokifatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifatatateshĂ«m|gokifatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofatatankerom|gofatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofatatankeshĂ«|gofatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofatatankeshĂ«m|gofatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofatatankeya|gofatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fatataterom|fatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fatatatemu|fatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fatatateya|fatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifatataterom|gokifatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifatatatemu|gokifatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifatatateya|gokifatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠte|fĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠtesher|fĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠtero|fĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠtĂŠtero|gokifĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠterom|fĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠtĂŠteya|fĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠtĂŠteya|gokifĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:faftafte|faftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:faftaftesher|faftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faftaftesherĂ«m|faftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faftaftero|faftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:faftafteshĂ«|faftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faftafteshĂ«m|faftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaftaftero|gokifaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifaftafteshĂ«|gokifaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifaftafteshĂ«m|gokifaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofaftafnkerom|gofaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofaftafnkeshĂ«|gofaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofaftafnkeshĂ«m|gofaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofaftafnkeya|gofaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faftafterom|faftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faftaftemu|faftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:faftafteya|faftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaftafterom|gokifaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifaftaftemu|gokifaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifaftafteya|gokifaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
